name: neoncode-electron-app
description: NeonCode Electron app rendering neoncode-hub PTYs with xterm.js.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build:node && npm run build:renderer:modules && npm run build:tests && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test:unit: node dist/tests/config-store.js && node dist/tests/token-loader.js && node dist/tests/hub-client-auth.js && node dist/tests/reconnect-policy.js && node dist/tests/session-model.js && node dist/tests/reconnect-output-soak.js && node dist/tests/terminal-pane-fake-hub.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test:unit
